news.summary: On June 27, 2025, a prominent company known as VNET Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: VNET), operating in China as a top carrier- and cloud-neutral internet data center services provider, shared exciting news. The company expressed its assurance in the future progress and potential growth of VNET.
news.headline: VNET authorizes $50M share repurchase program to show confidence in future growth; leading internet data center in China.

news.summary: In Ashburn, Virginia, on June 27, 2025, Abich Financial Services Inc. (AFS) announced their certification as a Great Place To Work® (GPTW®) company. AFS achieved a remarkable employee satisfaction rate, with 100% of their employees stating that it is an excellent workplace environment. This exceeds the national average of 57%. The Great Place To Work Certification is a prestigious accolade that reflects the positive workplace culture and employee experience at AFS.
news.headline: Abich Financial earns 2025 Great Place To Work Certification with 100% employee satisfaction, surpassing national average.

news.summary: Marqeta, Inc., a leading modern card issuing platform traded on NASDAQ as MQ, will be conducting a conference call and webcast to review its financial performance for the second quarter of 2025. The event is scheduled for Wednesday, August 6, 2025, at 4:30 pm ET, with Mike Milotich, the Interim CEO and CFO, leading the discussion. Following the call, a press release containing the Q2 2025 financial results will be released after the market closes.
news.headline: Marqeta to unveil Q2 2025 results on Aug 6, 2025; conference call with CEO Mike Milotich at 4:30 pm ET.

news.summary: In Milpitas, California, SS8 Networks, a prominent player in Lawful and Location Intelligence and Monitoring center platforms, has disclosed its acquisition by Mill Point Capital LLC. This development signifies a noteworthy achievement in SS8's advancement, aiming to drive penetration into fresh markets and fortify its technological infrastructure with a focus on AI-powered advancements. The acquisition will also serve to enrich its fundamental services in mediation, criminal monitoring, and investigative solutions.
news.headline: Lawful and Location Intelligence firm SS8 Networks acquired by Mill Point Capital LLC, enhancing tech stack and expanding into new markets.

news.summary: Schrödinger, Inc. revealed today that their clinical stage MALT1 inhibitor, SGR-1505, has been granted Fast Track designation by the FDA for treating adult patients with Waldenström macroglobulinemia who have not responded to at least two lines of therapy, including a Bruton’s tyrosine kinase (BTK) inhibitor. The Fast Track designation highlights the urgent requirement for new treatment options in patients. Schrödinger, Inc. is listed on Nasdaq as SDGR.
news.headline: Schrödinger's SGR-1505 has Fast Track designation from FDA for treating Waldenström macroglobulinemia. $SDGR #MedicalInnovation

news.summary: Lightspeed Financial Services Group LLC, based in Morristown, N.J., has introduced a new feature on its Lightspeed Trader platform allowing clients to trade U.S. stocks and ETFs around the clock. Traders can now execute trades on U.S. securities 24 hours a day for five days a week, starting on Sunday at 8:00 PM ET until Friday at 8:00 PM ET, excluding holidays and partial trading days. This enhancement offers global traders the opportunity to engage in continuous trading of U.S. securities.
news.headline: Lightspeed now supports 24/5 trading of US stocks & ETFs on Lightspeed Trader, allowing trades from Sunday 8:00 PM ET to Friday 8:00 PM ET.

news.summary: In San Francisco, companies Miraomics, Pythia Biosciences, and LatchBio have jointly unveiled a groundbreaking project - a massive 30 million cell atlas. This atlas covers more than 150 indications, 200 tissue types, and integrates 27 measurement technologies. The data was meticulously curated from public sources. Despite the wealth of information with millions of single cell transcriptomes available online, a significant barrier has been the high costs associated with organizing and annotating this data for further analysis. This collaboration has brought together these scattered resources into a single, comprehensive repository, which now stands as the largest collection of single-cell RNA sequencing data available.
news.headline: Miraomics, Pythia Biosciences, and LatchBio unveil a 30M cell atlas from 150+ indications, 200 tissue types, and 27 techs.

news.summary: Experienced business owners have documented effective strategies from numerous thriving companies, offering AI resources and funding for upcoming entrepreneurs. This initiative, spearheaded by Audos in New York on June 27, 2025, aims to empower the next wave of entrepreneurs with the tools and capital needed for success. Through codifying successful methods, they are equipping everyday individuals to create million-dollar AI ventures.
news.headline: Audos secures $11.5M to support entrepreneurs in creating million-dollar AI businesses, offering tools and capital.

news.summary: A team of underdog champions from the small town of Frankfort High School in Northern Michigan, boasting only 131 students, has gained nationwide acclaim for their exceptional season and recently formed partnership with GameAbove Sports. This collaboration has propelled the team to break records and achieve unprecedented success, showcasing the power of dedication and teamwork in high school sports.
news.headline: Small Frankfort HS with 131 students shines at Nike Nationals backed by GameAbove Sports, making headlines for record-breaking season.

news.summary: In a remarkable achievement, the Immutable-powered game TOKYO BEAST surged to the top spot on the Japan App Store just 48 hours after its launch, attracting an impressive 300,000 downloads. This milestone sets a new standard in the Web3 gaming sector. Japan's gaming market, valued at $27 billion, is among the most significant globally, making this feat even more remarkable.
news.headline: Web3 game TOKYO BEAST reaches #1 on Japan App Store with 300,000+ downloads in 48 hours, setting industry record. Japan gaming market valued at $27 billion.

news.summary: In the latest financial report, a total revenue of $15.6 million was recorded, showing a significant rise of $5.7 million or 58% compared to the previous year's quarter. The net income for this quarter reached $0.9 million, marking a substantial increase of $15.5 million from the same period last year. Additionally, the adjusted EBITDA stood at $4.0 million, demonstrating a notable surge of $2.4 million or 158% compared to the prior year quarter. The company's performance in the fourth quarter reflects a positive trend in direct sales and operational efficiency.
news.headline: Cineverse reports strong financial results, with $15.6M in total revenue, $0.9M net income, and $4.0M EBITDA in Q4 2025.

news.summary: In San Francisco on June 27, 2025, Bolt unveiled a new product called Bolt Connect aiming to assist marketplaces in quicker onboarding of merchants, enhancing operations efficiency, and scaling with reduced resources. This platform is designed to boost marketplace growth by enabling smoother processes and increased scalability.
news.headline: Bolt introduces Bolt Connect for marketplaces on June 27, 2025, to enhance merchant onboarding and operations.
Kashkari Says Tariffs Have Only Slight Effects on Prices, Business Activity, and Jobs

news.summary: On June 27, 2025, PriceSmart, Inc. revealed plans to reschedule its conference call for the third quarter fiscal results of 2025. The call, initially set for July 11, will now take place on July 14, 2025. PriceSmart, Inc. (NASDAQ: PSMT) made this announcement, moving the call by three days to address financial updates.
news.headline: PriceSmart reschedules Q3 fiscal year 2025 financial results conference call from July 11 to July 14.

news.summary: The recipients of the EPEAT award have combined efforts to decrease the collective carbon footprint by more than 500,000 metric tons of CO2 equivalent, demonstrating a significant reduction in the environmental impact of technology. Recently, Geotab Inc., a prominent provider of connected vehicle solutions and asset management on a global scale, was acknowledged for their contributions. This recognition serves as a testament to their commitment to sustainability and environmental responsibility.
news.headline: Geotab awarded for sustainable electronics procurement, EPEAT winners cut 500,000 metric tons of CO2(eq), reducing tech impact.

news.summary: In a recent announcement made on June 27, 2025, Bastien Perrot, the CEO of Exclusive Healthcare, was recognized by Business Worldwide Magazine as the recipient of the "Insurance Brokerage CEO of the Year" award in the Expat Healthcare Segment category. This prestigious accolade is part of the 2025 CEO Awards by Business Worldwide Magazine, designed to honor exceptional leaders in various industries. Bastien Perrot's achievement highlights his notable contributions to the field and underscores his success in the specialized area of expat healthcare. This recognition showcases his leadership and expertise, further solidifying Exclusive Healthcare's position in the market.
news.headline: Bastien Perrot of Exclusive Healthcare wins Business Worldwide Magazine's 2025 CEO Award for "Insurance Brokerage CEO of the Year."

news.summary: A fast-growing Hybrid RIA is shifting to Cambridge to access greater flexibility, more personalized support, and a highly collaborative culture between the home office and larger enterprises. This new partnership will allow the firm to broaden affiliation models for The AmeriFlex Group's advisors at all career stages, fostering expansion opportunities.
news.headline: AmeriFlex Group partners with Cambridge for growth & enhanced service for financial advisors, transitioning to Cambridge for flexibility and personalized support. Expands affiliation models for advisors.

news.summary: On June 27, 2025, Norfolk Southern Corporation (NYSE: NSC) revealed plans to disclose its financial performance for the second quarter of 2025 through a live conference call and webcast scheduled for 8:30 a.m. ET on Tuesday, July 29, 2025. The company will release the quarterly earnings prior to this event.
news.headline: Norfolk Southern (NYSE: NSC) to report Q2 2025 earnings on July 29, 2025 at 8:30 am ET.

news.summary: Today, VNET Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: VNET), a prominent provider of carrier- and cloud-neutral internet data center services in China, revealed that the Company has experienced a rise in its overall net revenues and adjusted EBITDA (non-GAAP).
news.headline: VNET raises full-year 2025 revenue and adjusted EBITDA guidance in China, surpassing previous estimates.

news.summary: In Aurora, Illinois, on June 27, 2025, Rival Nutrition revealed the introduction of a fresh product line designed to cater to the performance and recovery requirements of active individuals. This meticulously crafted assortment boasts clean nutrient profiles and simple ingredient compositions to aid in supporting individuals' fitness goals.
news.headline: Rival Nutrition launches new clean-ingredient product line for active individuals on June 27, 2025.

news.summary: NASHUA, N.H. - On June 27, 2025, databahn introduced its latest GenAI Sales Intelligence platform. This new tool targets technology sales reps and account-based marketers, enabling them to create personalized, in-depth account profiles for Fortune 500 companies instantly. The platform offers detailed insights and information for effective targeting and engagement strategies.
news.headline: databahn launches GenAI Sales Intelligence platform to revolutionize account research for Fortune 500 with next-gen capabilities.

news.summary: New platform based in Boca Raton, Florida, launched on June 27, 2025, by AffordableHousing.com, integrates Opportunity Atlas economic mobility data with air-quality information. The platform offers renters a detailed analysis to select neighborhoods with promising prospects for the future. This innovative tool provides comprehensive insights into various areas, ensuring informed decisions for potential residents.
news.headline: AffordableHousing.com's new maps merge economic mobility data with air quality insights, aiding renters in locating optimal neighborhoods. Launch announced on June 27, 2025, in Boca Raton.

news.summary: In San Diego on June 27, 2025, Calidi Biotherapeutics Inc. (NYSE American: CLDI) announced their focus on systemic oncolytic targeted immunotherapies with genetic payload delivery. CEO Eric Poma, PhD, shared a letter with shareholders outlining the company's progress.
news.headline: Calidi Biotherapeutics (NYSE: CLDI) CEO, Eric Poma, PhD, sends letter to shareholders about company's strides in immunotherapies.

news.summary: On June 27, 2025, in New York, Mixed Martial Arts Group Limited (NYSE American: MMA), known as MMA, a company listed on the NYSE American, is focused on revolutionizing combat sports and digital transformation. The company hopes to initiate a worldwide movement to transform the way martial arts are perceived by providing immersive, blockchain-enhanced encounters.
news.headline: MMA.INC partners with Morphotech to launch Crypto Platform, rewarding fans with tokens for engagement.

news.summary: A cutting-edge AR/VR app has been launched to help students investigate in-demand professions for the upcoming school year 2025–2026. This innovative tool allows users to immerse themselves in various career options using augmented and virtual reality technology. Students can gain valuable insights into high-demand fields through interactive experiences, guiding them towards making informed decisions about their future. With an estimated **number** of careers showcased in the app, it serves as a valuable resource for students looking to explore different career paths and make well-informed choices for their academic and professional development.
news.headline: zSpace debuts Career Explorer app at ISTELive 25 to aid students in discovering high-demand careers for 2025–2026 school year.

news.summary: Together with Boyu AI Technology, a joint venture will be formed to enhance core software-hardware research and development, as well as to facilitate the deployment of vertical markets. This collaboration will also focus on industry incubation. The partnership aims to amplify these efforts and improve outcomes in key areas.
news.headline: Richtech Robotics partners with Beijing City of Design Development for AI-powered service robotics; joint venture Boyu AI Technology to focus on software-hardware R&D, market deployment, and industry incubation.

news.summary: A recent patent has been obtained by the Company as part of its efforts to enhance minimally invasive treatments targeting nerves for various urgent medical conditions.
news.headline: Autonomix Medical, Inc. receives new U.S. patent for catheter-based platform; strengthens nerve-focused treatment innovation.

news.summary: A comprehensive collection of smoke and carbon monoxide alarms called PLACE has been created to improve home safety, comfort, and security through tailored features for each room.
news.headline: Gentex introduces PLACE Smart Home Safety System, offering advanced smoke and carbon monoxide alarms for improved safety and security.

news.summary: Today, CorMedix Inc. (Nasdaq: CRMD) in Berkeley Heights, N.J., a biopharmaceutical company dedicated to developing and selling therapeutic products for critical diseases, disclosed the pricing of its recent underwritten public offering. The offering consists of 6,604,507 shares of its common stock, aiming to generate around $85 million in total gross proceeds for the Company. Furthermore, CorMedix has provided the underwriters with a 30-day option to buy up to an additional 15% of the common stock shares offered. The closing of the offering is anticipated to take place by June 30, 2025, contingent upon meeting standard closing conditions.
news.headline: CorMedix Inc. prices public offering at 6,604,507 shares, expected to raise $85 million. Underwriters have option for 15% more.

news.summary: An initial amount of $5.0 million was raised in upfront gross proceeds, with the potential for an additional $9.8 million in gross proceeds if all private placement warrants are fully exercised in cash.
news.headline: Lyra Therapeutics launching $15 million offering & concurrent private placement priced at-the-market under Nasdaq rules, including $5 million upfront gross proceeds & potential $9.8 million more from full warrant exercise.
Ultragenyx gets Breakthrough Therapy status for GTX-102 in treating Angelman Syndrome, a rare genetic disorder.

news.summary: A new strategic partnership has been formed to accelerate global growth efforts. This alliance aims to boost key metrics like revenue, market reach, and customer base. The collaboration is set to leverage each partner's strengths to achieve significant growth targets. This move is expected to propel the companies towards their goal of increasing market share by double digits. With this partnership, a substantial increase in international expansion and market diversification is anticipated, promising a positive trajectory for global growth initiatives.
news.headline: Captivision & digiLED complete phase 1 of LED installations at Canary Wharf, boosting global growth.

news.summary: On June 27, 2025, Apollo (NYSE: APO) announced that it will unveil its financial performance for the second quarter of 2025 on August 5, 2025, before the commencement of trading on the New York Stock Exchange. This disclosure will be made at 8:30 am EDT through a public webcast on Apollo’s Investor Relations platform at ir.apollo.com. Following the event, a replay will be accessible an hour later for review.
news.headline: Apollo (NYSE: APO) to reveal Q2 2025 financial results on Aug 5, 2025, before NYSE trading opens at 8:30am EDT. Webcast at ir.apollo.com.

news.summary: In Montclair, New Jersey, on June 27, 2025, 180 Degree Capital Corp. (NASDAQ: TURN) has announced that the date of the special meeting for shareholders to elect directors has been rescheduled to September 15, 2025.
news.headline: 180 Degree Capital Corp. postpones special meeting to Sept 15, 2025 for election of directors per shareholder request.

news.summary: In a report released today, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has reached the lowest point in over a decade at 3.5%. The economy also witnessed an increase of 250,000 new jobs created in the last month, exceeding expectations. Additionally, the stock market saw a significant rise with the major indices all showing gains of over 2%. Analysts are optimistic about the future economic outlook based on these positive indicators.
news.headline: Locafy teams up with top U.S. reputation platform to expand "AI-Ready" search solutions deployment.

news.summary: On June 27, 2025, in Novi, Michigan, Gentherm, a leading global company in thermal management and pneumatic comfort technologies, revealed the expansion of its partnership with DUOMED to include France. This collaboration, which has been successful in the Benelux region, is a strategic move to provide advanced patient temperature management technologies to healthcare professionals and patients across Europe. Gentherm is listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol THRM.
news.headline: Gentherm expands partnership with DUOMED into France, aiming to enhance distribution of patient temperature management technologies in Europe.

news.summary: On June 27, 2025, AYR Wellness Inc. (CSE: AYR.A, OTCQX: AYRWF) announced an update on its interim financial statements for the three-month period ending on March 31, 2025. AYR, a prominent U.S. multi-state cannabis operator, shared information about the status of its management’s discussion and analysis, along with the CEO and CFO certificates concerning the Interim Filings. news.summary: Abacus Global Management, Inc. revealed plans on June 27, 2025, to undertake an exchange offer and consent solicitation concerning its existing public warrants to purchase common stock, traded on The Nasdaq Capital Market under "ABLLW," and private placement warrants. news.summary: On June 27, 2025, in New York, a national awareness campaign commenced to address patient safety within healthcare amidst rapid innovation. The initiative aims to equip hospitals, clinicians, and patients with essential tools and strategies to enhance quality care. The campaign seeks to raise awareness on the importance of patient safety and facilitate collaboration to reduce medical errors and improve outcomes. This effort comes at a critical time when advancements in healthcare are progressing swiftly, emphasizing the significance of ensuring patient safety.
news.headline: New campaign launched on June 27, 2025, focuses on patient safety in healthcare, aiming to empower hospitals, clinicians, and patients.
